prompt: A bold Japanese editorial poster, vertical orientation. The Japanese is set as a single tategaki vertical column running from top-right to bottom. To the left of the title, a smaller horizontal English subtitle: the exact text "The future is not drawn, it is planned." in thin sans-serif. Background: deep indigo #0e1a3a with very subtle paper texture. A thin gold horizontal rule above and below the English subtitle. Bottom-right tiny attribution text in soft gold: "ccskill-gptimage / 2026". Generous negative space. Editorial magazine aesthetic.
